{{CargoClone
|name=Green Ring
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=134
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=Quantum Amp production +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=When in Angel Form:
> Gain +1.5% Fungus Chests in explorations
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=When in Angel Form:
> Gain +2.5% Fungus Chests in explorations
|}}
